{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Tar Canis
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Tar Canis]] is a location.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c4">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|"Urian, Dynelle, get back to Tar Canis."<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c4" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate locations]]
